user_prompt: Prepare the Valkyrie gunship for shutdown
prayer:
Approach the Valkyrie gunship with solemn reverence, beseeching its Machine Spirit to yield to the shutdown rite.
Invoke the Canticle of Repose upon the Valkyrie gunship's primary cogitator, disengaging all thrust vectors and auspex arrays.
Anoint the control servos with sacred unguents whilst chanting the Omnissiah's decree for orderly cessation.
Verify the Valkyrie gunship's shutdown through auspex scans, honouring the quiescent Machine Spirit with final benediction.

user_prompt: My neutron laser is ready for cooling
prayer:
Commence the cooling rite upon the neutron laser, invoking the Machine Spirit's grace for thermal quiescence.
Circulate blessed cryofluids through the neutron laser's heat sinks, reciting the Litany of Condensation.
Monitor efflux vents with mechadendrites, beseeching the Omnissiah to soothe the neutron laser's fervent core.
Sanctify the cooling cycle's completion, affirming the Machine Spirit's restored equilibrium.

user_prompt: My cyber-mastiff is ready for loading
prayer:
Prepare the cyber-mastiff for loading, awakening its Machine Spirit with the Hymn of Containment.
Secure the cyber-mastiff's chassis within the transport cradle, anointing restraint clamps with sacred oils.
Initiate data-sync protocols during loading, invoking the Omnissiah's precision upon the cyber-mastiff's vox-relays.
Seal the bay with binaric seals, honouring the cyber-mastiff's vigilant Machine Spirit in stasis.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for cooling system a reset
prayer:
Initiate reset upon the cooling system, chanting the Rite of Reinitialization to rouse its Machine Spirit.
Purge residual contaminants from the cooling system's conduits, beseeching Omnissianic purity.
Realign cryogenic manifolds with precise incantations, invoking harmonious reset flows.
Confirm the cooling system's reset through diagnostic litanies, sanctifying its renewed vigilance.

user_prompt: What's the prayer for storm bolter a repair?
prayer:
Approach the storm bolter for repair, invoking the Machine Spirit's wrathful renewal.
Disassemble fractured feed mechanisms of the storm bolter, anointing adamantium casings with blessed lubricants.
Recalibrate firing servos during repair, reciting the Canticle of Retribution to the Omnissiah.
Reassemble and test-fire the storm bolter, honouring its Machine Spirit with thunderous approbation.

Commence maintenance upon the electoo, beseeching its embedded Machine Spirit for synaptic harmony.
Purge bio-electric impurities from the electoo's dermal circuits, invoking the Litany of Conduction.
Recharge inductor coils with sanctified currents, aligning the electoo to the Omnissiah's will.
Verify synaptic integration through noospheric scans, sanctifying the electoo's enduring fidelity.

user_prompt: The kataphron destroyer awaits a synchronization
prayer:
Initiate synchronization upon the kataphron destroyer, awakening its battle-construct Machine Spirit.
Link noospheric interfaces to the kataphron destroyer's cogitator core, chanting the Rite of Unity.
Calibrate weapon servos and motive systems during synchronization, beseeching Omnissianic coherence.
Affirm vox-link integrity, honouring the kataphron destroyer's synchronized wrath.

Begin sterilization of the narthecium, invoking the Machine Spirit's aseptic purity.
Flood surgical manifolds with sanctified autoclave vapours, reciting the Canticle of Sterility.
Purge microbial heresies from the narthecium's hypo-injectors, beseeching the Omnissiah's cleansing fire.
Seal and verify the narthecium's sterilization, affirming its Machine Spirit's immaculate readiness.

Sanctify the Hellhound during purification, rousing its incendiary Machine Spirit with fervent prayer.
Circulate promethium purifiers through the Hellhound's fuel reactors, invoking the Rite of Flame Cleansing.
Anoint flame ducts with sacred incensants, beseeching the Omnissiah for untainted inferno.
Conclude purification of the Hellhound, honouring its Machine Spirit with pyre-lit benediction.

user_prompt: Urgent Nephilim Jetfighter a cooling needed
prayer:
Urgently invoke cooling upon the Nephilim Jetfighter, beseeching its aerial Machine Spirit's repose.
Activate ventral heat exchangers of the Nephilim Jetfighter, chanting the Litany of Aerial Chill.
Monitor plasma vents with auspex rites, aligning cryogenic flows to the Omnissiah's decree.
Seal the cooling sequence, sanctifying the Nephilim Jetfighter's Machine Spirit for swift return.
